prompt.goal: Create JobPosting entity, DbSet, Fluent API, EF migration. No controllers/views.
prompt.hardRules: - Only JobPosting model this task (no Application/Matching) - Map fields to Database/StudyMate_Schema.sql JobPostings - Status default Open; Budget decimal(10,2)
prompt.outputRequired: - Models/JobPosting.cs - ApplicationDbContext update - Migration AddJobPosting - Prompt + Report
